mapper.update: UPDATE user SET detection_count = detection_count + 1, total_processed_videos = total_processed_videos + 1, total_2d_videos = total_2d_videos + 1 WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE user SET detection_count = detection_count + 1, total_processed_videos = total_processed_videos + 1, total_3d_videos = total_3d_videos + 1 WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task( user_id, original_video_id, video_type, target_fps, process_count, task_status, create_at ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, #{original_video_id}, #{video_type}, #{target_fps}, #{process_count}, #{task_status}, #{create_at} )
